items.title: Anthropic says "some routine tasks like coding and debugging" on Fable 5 "will fall back to Opus 4.8" in "the near term" as it works to "reduce false positives" (@anthropicai)
items.title_original: Anthropic says "some routine tasks like coding and debugging" on Fable 5 "will fall back to Opus 4.8" in "the near term" as it works to "reduce false positives" (@anthropicai)
items.title_en: Anthropic says "some routine tasks like coding and debugging" on Fable 5 "will fall back to Opus 4.8" in "the near term" as it works to "reduce false positives" (@anthropicai)
items.title_zh: Anthropic 表示，《神鬼寓言 5》中的“一些日常任务，例如编码和调试”，“在短期内”将退回到 Opus 4.8，因为它可以“减少误报”（@anthropicai）
items.title_bilingual: Anthropic 表示，《神鬼寓言 5》中的“一些日常任务，例如编码和调试”，“在短期内”将退回到 Opus 4.8，因为它可以“减少误报”（@anthropicai） / Anthropic says "some routine tasks like coding and debugging" on Fable 5 "will fall back to Opus 4.8" in "the near term" as it works to "reduce false positives" (@anthropicai)

items.title: Leaked Apple supplier docs show iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max may use Qualcomm modems in the US and Apple's own C2 chips elsewhere, A20 Pro packaging tech, and more (Marko Zivkovic/AppleInsider)
items.title_original: Leaked Apple supplier docs show iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max may use Qualcomm modems in the US and Apple's own C2 chips elsewhere, A20 Pro packaging tech, and more (Marko Zivkovic/AppleInsider)
items.title_en: Leaked Apple supplier docs show iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max may use Qualcomm modems in the US and Apple's own C2 chips elsewhere, A20 Pro packaging tech, and more (Marko Zivkovic/AppleInsider)
items.title_zh: 泄露的苹果供应商文档显示，iPhone 18 Pro 和 Pro Max 可能在美国使用高通调制解调器，在其他地方使用苹果自己的 C2 芯片、A20 Pro 封装技术等（Marko Zivkovic/AppleInsider）
items.title_bilingual: 泄露的苹果供应商文档显示，iPhone 18 Pro 和 Pro Max 可能在美国使用高通调制解调器，在其他地方使用苹果自己的 C2 芯片、A20 Pro 封装技术等（Marko Zivkovic/AppleInsider） / Leaked Apple supplier docs show iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max may use Qualcomm modems in the US and Apple's own C2 chips elsewhere, A20 Pro packaging tech, and more (Marko Zivkovic/AppleInsider)

items.title: Japan commits up to $6.16B over five years to Noetra, a consortium led by SoftBank, Honda, NEC, and Sony, to develop a domestic AI foundation model by 2027 (Nikkei Asia)
items.title_original: Japan commits up to $6.16B over five years to Noetra, a consortium led by SoftBank, Honda, NEC, and Sony, to develop a domestic AI foundation model by 2027 (Nikkei Asia)
items.title_en: Japan commits up to $6.16B over five years to Noetra, a consortium led by SoftBank, Honda, NEC, and Sony, to develop a domestic AI foundation model by 2027 (Nikkei Asia)
items.title_zh: 日本承诺在五年内向由软银、本田、NEC 和索尼牵头的 Noetra 财团提供高达 6.16B 美元的资金，以在 2027 年之前开发国内人工智能基础模型（日经亚洲）
items.title_bilingual: 日本承诺在五年内向由软银、本田、NEC 和索尼牵头的 Noetra 财团提供高达 6.16B 美元的资金，以在 2027 年之前开发国内人工智能基础模型（日经亚洲） / Japan commits up to $6.16B over five years to Noetra, a consortium led by SoftBank, Honda, NEC, and Sony, to develop a domestic AI foundation model by 2027 (Nikkei Asia)

昨天被爆出在系统提示中，以用户无法察觉的方式将市区代理和 AI 实验室信息放进去，用这种方式获取一些用户的信息。

结果被发现并传播以后，...
